name: reconstruction_nn_parammatched_synthetic_seed42_v1
purpose: Run the repository's parameter-matched MLP comparison on the prepared public LEAF Synthetic input; never a paper-reproduction claim.

metric_descriptions.mean_global_accuracy: unweighted client evaluation of one shared global model
metric_descriptions.mean_personalized_accuracy: unweighted client mean of personalized models

parameter_provenance.training_budget: PAPER_SPECIFIED: paper_main_v1 neural protocol where applicable

limitations: This is one public synthetic reconstruction input and one seed, not a paper multi-run result.
The paper source inputs and aggregation rule remain unavailable.
